summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of TradeNexus AI after JWT session management fixes. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Core frontend workflows operational with significant session management improvements, though some edge cases remain.

ui_bugs.component: JWT Session Management - Direct URL Access
ui_bugs.issue: Sessions expire when navigating directly to certain URLs (e.g., /admin/create-opportunity) but work fine through UI navigation flow

integration_issues.issue: Cannot access create opportunity form via direct URL due to session expiry, but works through dashboard navigation
Pipeline shows 'No deals in pipeline' - need to verify deal creation flow from AI matches

passed_tests: Admin dashboard loads with opportunities, stats, and premium enterprise design
Dashboard navigation and session persistence through UI flows
Exporter dashboard shows available opportunities with AI analysis
Express interest functionality works perfectly - shows 'Interest Submitted' status
AI analysis displays correct scores (85% opportunity, 20% risk)
Pipeline view loads with all deal stages (Received, Interest, Shortlisted, Introduction, Negotiation, Closed)
Backend API authentication and all CRUD operations (25/25 tests passed)
Opportunity detail pages with comprehensive information
Stats dashboard showing correct counts (8 opportunities, 7 active, 5 exporters)
Premium UI design with navy/charcoal theme maintained
Axios interceptors working for most navigation scenarios

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (core functionality working, session management significantly improved but edge cases remain)

action_item_for_main_agent: JWT session management is much improved but still has edge cases with direct URL navigation. Consider implementing token refresh mechanism or fixing route-level authentication guards. Deal creation flow from AI matchmaking needs verification - pipeline shows no deals despite express interest functionality working.
